nodes.text: Such a dork. Relax and enjoy the moment. Take a deep breath and breathe — because you, Sir, summoned frickin' elementals. Without a monstrous manual, no less.
You have to admit — that is worth some mad real-life XP right there. This tinnitus in my ear is like a ding. Methinks I've leveled up.
So just roll with it, brother. You're posting good stats. Keep an eye on the endgame. Move the balls down field. And remember to use all the players — (who are players who are players).
It's cool. I get it. But you have to realize certain things about me. Firstly — my life is a work in progress. Second — I've got much to do yet.
You are flesh. You are decay.
Everything is broken down, made new.
Alas — our sitting hour is up. You must pee, and break concentration.
Faust stands up and looks away from the painting.
Bladder is bursting. (as he pees) Oh — what a wonderful tea party.
